title: trichocentrum nudum subsp. stipitatum
intro: Trichocentrum nudum subsp. stipitatum, also known as the Spatula Orchid, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Trichocentrum nudum subsp. stipitatum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
